name: Planhat
description: Monitor Planhat customer success platform for user access and account management compliance

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to Planhat at https://app.planhat.com
2. Go to Settings → Integrations → API
3. Copy your API access token
4. Enter it below

credentialFields.label: API Access Token
credentialFields.helpText: Found in Planhat Settings → Integrations → API

checks.name: Employee Access
checks.description: Reviews Planhat team members and their customer success platform access

checks.name: App Availability
checks.description: Verifies Planhat customer accounts are being tracked
